votes.rationale: Motion-0033 successfully added a working context bundle generator. The system now emits dated motion snapshots, a repo capsule, an active path pack, and a manifest sidecar for reusable chat bootstrap context.

The motion stayed properly scoped. It shipped a text-first deterministic artifact generator rather than drifting into full retrieval or indexing, and rerun checks showed the three text artifacts remained stable across identical executions.

The implementation is coherent and proven. The bundle generator emits the expected files under surfaces/chat-context, excludes recursive output pollution after cleanup, and produces stable upload-friendly text artifacts suitable for future council and chat bootstrapping.
